headline: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Says Hormuz Closed But New Talks To Start; Nvidia, SpaceX Are Stocks To Watch
summary: Iran said it's closed the Strait of Hormuz but new peace talks are set to start Sunday. Nvidia and SpaceX are stocks to watch.
